description_long: This is a short, dark-colored picket fence section composed of evenly spaced vertical slats with pointed tops, connected by two horizontal rails. The vertical pickets are uniformly shaped, each ending in a sharp, triangular point, giving the fence a classic, secure appearance. The material appears to be a glossy, possibly painted or coated metal, which reflects light and suggests durability for outdoor use. The fence is solidly constructed, with no visible decorative embellishments or ornate features, emphasizing function over form. The structure is lightweight and likely intended as a temporary or movable barrier for gardens, sidewalks, or small urban enclosures. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on clear boundary marking and moderate deterrence.
description: A glossy, dark picket fence section with pointed tops and two horizontal rails, designed for clear boundary marking. The fence is simple, sturdy, and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing evenly spaced vertical pickets with pointed tops and two horizontal rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the sharpness of the picket points.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the same picket and rail arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness and pointed tops of the pickets.
